ai_role: AI data-center power, thermal management, and liquid cooling infrastructure
tvs_tiebreaker: Physical infrastructure exposure can complement TVS, but valuation and capex cycle should cap sizing.
technical_timing_rule: Technical timing should gate adds; avoid chasing EXTENDED setups.
rationale: Vertiv is directly levered to AI data-center power density and cooling requirements, but the stock can be cyclical and expectations may already reflect strong AI infrastructure demand.
